description: UI route-segment JS budgets (gzipped). Gate at scripts/check-bundle-budgets.mjs runs after `yarn build` and parses `.next/app-build-manifest.json` to assert per-route totals. Initial targets per Issue #1060; revisited at first cutover after 30 days of RUM data.
notes: Audience-route budgets are PR-blocking. Demo / admin / legacy d-board routes are un-budgeted at v1 — they live behind separate route groups and do not affect the audience surface.
Targets are tighter than the ADR-035 §55 baseline at v1. They will be re-calibrated against P75 RUM data after 30 days; if loosening is required, file an amendment to ADR-035.
